question: Create a base class `Employee` with `name` (string) and `salary` (double). Derive two classes: `Manager` (adds `department` string) and `Engineer` (adds `specialization` string). Implement constructors for all classes.

test_cases.expected:
Details from printEmployeeDetails (sliced):
Name: Alice, Salary: 75000

Details from printEmployeeDetails (sliced):
Name: Bob, Salary: 60000

errors: Object slicing occurs when derived class objects (Manager, Engineer) are passed by value to the 'printEmployeeDetails' function which expects an 'Employee' object. This results in the loss of derived-specific data and behavior.
